title: Astral Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Astral Pipes is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Tiruchirappalli office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes:
Astral Pipes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes!
